channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Nasdaq rises to record high as stocks get boost from oil pullback, strong earnings: Live updates
item.description: U.S. stocks were higher on Tuesday, while oil prices slid as traders reacted to a number of solid earnings results.

item.title: Michael Burry sells GameStop after Ryan Cohen's hefty eBay bid: 'Never confuse debt for creativity'
item.description: The "Big Short" investor said the proposed deal's enormous leverage shattered the investment case he had been building.

item.title: Ford’s secret EV unit emerges from shadows, still bullish on new pickup amid market slowdown
item.description: The "Universal Electric Vehicle" platform is expected to be key to Ford transforming its EV unit from billions of dollars in annual losses to breakeven by 2029.

item.title: Hegseth says 'the ceasefire is not over' after U.S., Iran exchange fire
item.description: DOD expected "some churn at the beginning" of "Project Freedom," Defense Sec. Hegseth said, referring to an effort to move ships through the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Property Play: Nvidia and PulteGroup are helping this startup put mini data centers on homes
item.description: A network of Span nodes, communicating with each other across the country, is the equivalent of a small to mid-sized traditional data center.

item.title: Here are Tuesday's biggest analyst calls: Apple, Tesla, CoreWeave, Amazon, Palantir, Home Depot & more
item.description: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Tuesday.

item.title: Central banks risk a recession by raising rates to tackle Iran oil shock, strategist warns
item.description: Central banks are widely expected to raise interest rates in a bid to temper soaring energy prices.

item.title: Crypto exchange Bullish to buy Equiniti for $4.2 billion in capital markets push
item.description: ⁠Bullish said on Tuesday it will buy transfer agent Equiniti in a deal valued at $4.2 billion, as the cryptocurrency exchange looks to establish infrastructure.

item.title: Ferrari tops Wall Street's first-quarter expectations ahead of EV debut
item.description: Ferrari NV on Tuesday beat Wall Street's first quarter earnings expectations and reconfirmed its guidance for the year.

item.title: Trump shrugged off an apparent Iran ceasefire violation. Traders say that's bullish
item.description: Traders on the Street are taking this as a bullish sign that Trump may be looking for an off-ramp to the conflict — which would give stocks a boost.

item.title: 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' kicks off summer movie season in style with $77 million opening
item.description: Disney and 20th Century Studios' "The Devil Wears Prada 2" opened the summer movie season with $77 million in ticket sales.

item.title: Should you buy Series I bonds amid higher inflation? What experts say
item.description: Series I bonds are paying 4.26% annual interest through Oct. 31 based on the latest inflation data. But you need to consider the trade-offs, experts say.

item.title: Pirro changes course in Fed investigation, move unlikely to satisfy Powell
item.description: The U.S. attorney opted not to appeal a ruling that had blocked her subpoenas to the Fed.

item.title: Major health insurers show signs of recovery – but a key test looms
item.description: Insurers have incomplete data on medical costs in the first quarter due to a lag in claims processing, which sets up the second quarter as the real test.

item.title: Coinbase cuts headcount by 14% citing AI acceleration. The shares are gaining
item.description: Coinbase will cut roughly 14% of its workforce, citing a combination of market volatility and the how AI is quickly changing how the company operates.

item.title: Palantir tops estimates on 85% revenue growth, fastest expansion since market debut in 2020
item.description: Palantir reported better-than-expected revenue and profit, driven by growth in sales to U.S. government agencies.

item.title: Secret Service officer arrested for indecent exposure in Miami after Trump golf event
item.description: Secret Service Officer John Spillman has been placed on administrative leave after his arrest.

item.title: Mortgage lenders now have more credit score options. What homebuyers should know
item.description: Lenders are beginning to use VantageScore 4.0, which factors in consumer data not currently considered in the score that's been used with mortgages for decades.

item.title: This beauty stock trading at a discount is building a 'flywheel to drive growth,' Bank of America says
item.description: The beauty retailer's investments seem poised to pay off, according to analyst Lorraine Hutchinson.

item.title: We're buying the post-earnings dip in an AI industrial stock with a bright future
item.description: We are buyers of this weakness because we have a longer-term view.

item.title: Pfizer tops Wall Street estimates, reaffirms outlook as newer products show growth
item.description: Pfizer is looking to newer products and acquisitions to offset a declining Covid business.

item.title: Does cruise insurance cover outbreaks?
item.description: Norovirus outbreaks on cruise ships have hit record numbers. Cruise insurance can help you recoup costs if you're sidelined, but there are restrictions.

item.title: Most prediction market traders don't make a profit—Gen Z and millennials are turning to them anyway
item.description: Recent studies of Polymarket data shows most users lose money on the prediction market platform. Traders may still see wealth-building opportunities there.

item.title: Milken-adjacent Power100 attendees aim to reclaim the DEI in finance narrative
item.description: Blueprint Capital's Power100 weekend convenes diverse leaders in finance ahead of the Milken Institute Global Conference.

item.title: Executives are burning out, just like their employees—and they don't know how to handle it, management experts say
item.description: As executives battle an increase in burnout, a leadership expert says brain breaks and being comfortable not knowing all the answers can help.

item.title: Psychotherapist: Couples who practice this one habit ‘tend to relieve a lot of stress’—here’s why
item.description: “Admin meeting is one of the rituals I always assign to my couples,” says relationship expert Sara Nasserzadeh.

item.title: SEC and Elon Musk agree to settle lawsuit over Twitter buyout in 2022
item.description: The SEC and Elon Musk agreed to settle a lawsuit filed by the regulator last year against the world's richest person.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Palantir Technologies, PayPal, Intel, Anheuser-Busch InBev & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in early trading.

item.title: An attractive entry point has emerged in this name tied to AI data centers, says JPMorgan
item.description: Cogent Communications is strengthening its balance sheet after a lackluster first-quarter earnings report, positioning it to regain ground, per JPMorgan.

item.title: AB InBev returns to growth as it cheers better beer sales
item.description: Belgian brewer Anheuser-Busch InBev sold more drinks for the first time since 2023 in the ​first quarter.
